name: Orio X-Power
tag: Natural Energy for Men · Shilajit & Swarn Bhasmi
short: Strength, stamina and vitality — a 20-herb classical formula anchored by Shudh Shilajit and Swarn Bhasma (calcined aurum).
long: A premium men's health formulation combining Shudh Shilajit and Swarn Bhasma with a full spectrum of classical rasayana herbs. Improves physical strength and endurance, enhances energy and reduces fatigue, boosts vitality and overall performance, and supports immunity and men's health.
dosage: 1–2 capsules twice a day, or as directed by the physician
indications: General debility, low stamina, fatigue, and men's wellness support.
caution: An Ayurvedic proprietary medicine. To be taken under medical supervision.

name: ZenArsh
short: Helps control bleeding piles — relieves burning and itching, softens stools, and supports the healing of fissures and wounds.
long: A targeted Ayurvedic formulation for piles and fissure care. Relieves burning, itching and discomfort, softens stools and improves bowel movement, supports healing of anal fissures, and helps in anal fissure and fissure pain. Promotes healing of fissures and wounds.
dosage: 1–2 capsules twice a day, or as directed by the physician
benefits: Softens stools and improves bowel movement
Helps in anal fissure & fissure pain
indications: Bleeding piles · Itching & irritation · Pain & discomfort · Anal fissures · Constipation & hard stools
caution: To be taken under medical supervision. An Ayurvedic Proprietary Medicine, Mfg. Lic. No. 649 PB (AY).

name: Zen Liv-Fit
tag: Digestive Capsules · Strong Liver, Better Digestion, Better Life
short: A 15-herb liver formula for fatty liver, hepatitis recovery, detoxification and better digestion.
long: Comprehensive liver support: helps reduce fat accumulation in the liver, supports liver health and post-hepatitis recovery, helps remove toxins, and improves digestion and nutrient absorption. Useful in hepatitis and jaundice, and promotes overall vitality and wellness.
dosage: 1–2 capsules twice a day, or as directed by the physician
benefits: Fatty liver — helps reduce fat accumulation in the liver
Better digestion — improves digestion & nutrient absorption
Improves appetite, useful in jaundice, promotes overall vitality
indications: Fatty liver · Hepatitis & jaundice · Poor digestion & appetite · Liver detoxification and metabolic support
caution: To be taken under medical supervision. An Ayurvedic Proprietary Medicine, Mfg. Lic. No. 649 PB (AY).

name: Leuco D-90
short: Traditional support for white discharge, uterine health and hormonal balance — soothes irritation and odour.
long: A women's wellness formulation offering traditional support for leucorrhoea. Reduces white discharge, supports uterine health, helps balance female hormones, and soothes irritation and odour. Addresses weakness, fatigue or body ache and burning sensation, especially during urination.
dosage: 1–2 capsules thrice a day, or as directed by the physician
benefits: Soothes itching & irritation in the vaginal area
Helps with weakness, fatigue or body ache
Eases burning sensation, especially during urination
indications: Bad smell & white discharge · Itching & irritation · Weakness, fatigue or body ache · Burning sensation during urination
caution: To be taken under medical supervision. An Ayurvedic Proprietary Medicine, Mfg. Lic. No. 649 PB (AY).

name: Zen Stone D-80
tag: Powerful Ayurvedic Support for Kidney Health
short: Helps dissolve kidney stones and flush them out naturally, while supporting kidney function and reducing recurrence.
long: An Ayurvedic proprietary medicine that helps in dissolving kidney stones and their recurrence. Helps break down kidney stones into small pieces and flush them out, supports kidney function and cleansing, and offers support in urinary tract infection.
dosage: 1–2 capsules twice a day, or as directed by the physician
indications: Kidney stone · Burning micturition · Urinary infection · Pain & discomfort in urination
caution: Each 500 mg capsule contains processed extract. To be taken under medical supervision. Mfg. Lic. No. 649 PB (AY).
